metadata.description: Code-anchored decision log for AI-generated code — one plugin, shared across every coding agent via MCP.

plugins.name: rationale
plugins.description: git blame for AI decisions: capture why agents chose what they chose, anchor it to code, and expose it to future sessions via an MCP server. Includes a staleness detector, decision graph, confidence-weighted rollups, and an EU AI Act JSON-LD export with HMAC / Ed25519 signing.
